name: Frozen Trotter Soup
shortDesc: Beef trotters slow-cooked for 12 hours with garlic, onion and bay leaf, then flash-frozen — ready for your table any time
metaDesc: Çorbacı frozen trotter soup. Cooked for 12 hours, flash-frozen, additive-free and preservative-free traditional trotter.
keywords: frozen trotter soup, frozen paça, flash-frozen soup, corbaci frozen
longDesc: Fresh beef trotters, garlic, onion and bay leaf are slow-cooked for over 12 hours to build a rich, collagen-packed bone broth
Flash-freezing locks in the freshness, aroma and nutritional value of the day it was made
Only meat, bone broth and natural spices are used — no additives or preservatives
Simply heat from frozen — the deep, traditional flavour of trotter soup on your table in minutes
Rich in collagen, it supports the immune system and delivers a satisfying, nourishing meal

otherDesc.name: Storage
otherDesc.value: Can be kept in the freezer for 6 months

otherDesc.name: Shelf Life
otherDesc.value: Once thawed, consume at first heating
